_comment_purpose: Queries used by the description optimizer (Anthropic's skill-creator run_loop.py) to tune the SKILL.md description field. Each query has expected_trigger:true or false - the optimizer measures precision/recall against this set.
_comment_constraint: The optimizer uses claude -p (headless CLI), which cannot invoke visualize:show_widget. Skills that depend on widget rendering see recall=0% because the model rationally refuses to invoke a skill whose primary tool is unavailable. See tests/EVALS.md Surface 4 for context.
_comment_reference: Aim for 10-20 queries balanced between should-fire and should-skip. Keep around even if the optimizer is currently blocked - useful for if/when the harness gets a stub show_widget tool.
